title: Auth flow doesn't specify token revocation timing
body: The auth flow doesn't say how quickly a revoked token stops working — race window between logout and token invalidation, and the security/compliance stakeholder wasn't named.

title: Empty-state behavior for zero search results unclear
body: What does the user see when their query returns nothing? Spec is silent on this case.

title: Missing rate limit on token issuance endpoint
body: Both stakeholders (security team consideration) and gaps (no abuse-prevention requirement) flagged: no rate limit on the token issuance path could be abused as an oracle.
